scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server run prisma:generate
scripts.vercel-build: cd server && npx prisma db push --skip-generate && cd .. && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.start: cd server && npx prisma db push --skip-generate && node src/index.js
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.db:push: cd server && npx prisma db push
